all.en: To, Procurement Department; from, Hana Kim, Marketing Operations Manager.
all.zh: 致：採購部；發文者：Hana Kim，行銷營運經理。

all.en: Subject, request to purchase new office equipment for the third floor.
all.zh: 主旨：申請為三樓採購新辦公設備。

all.en: I am writing to request approval for several urgent equipment upgrades.
all.zh: 本人謹此申請核准數項急迫的設備升級。

all.en: Our team has grown from twelve members to twenty-two over the past year.
all.zh: 我們團隊過去一年已從 12 人成長至 22 人。

all.en: The current shared printer cannot handle our growing print volume.
all.zh: 現有的共用印表機已無法負荷我們持續增加的列印量。

all.en: We propose purchasing one AeroPrint X9 multifunction unit at retail price.
all.zh: 我們建議以零售價購買一台 AeroPrint X9 多功能事務機。

all.en: Estimated cost is twenty-eight hundred dollars including extended warranty.
all.zh: 預估費用為 2,800 美元，含延長保固。

all.en: We also need eight new ergonomic chairs to replace damaged ones.
all.zh: 我們也需要八張新的人體工學椅，以汰換損壞的椅子。

all.en: Several employees have complained of back pain in recent monthly surveys.
all.zh: 近月調查中已有多位員工反映背部疼痛。

all.en: The recommended model is the Steelcase Series Two task chair.
all.zh: 建議型號為 Steelcase Series Two 辦公椅。

all.en: Each chair costs around six hundred dollars after the corporate discount.
all.zh: 扣除企業折扣後，每張椅子約 600 美元。

all.en: Additionally, the meeting room speaker phone makes static during conference calls.
all.zh: 此外，會議室擴音電話於會議通話時出現雜音。

all.en: We would like to replace it with a Poly Sync 60 unit.
all.zh: 我們希望以 Poly Sync 60 機種更換之。

all.en: The replacement quote is nine hundred dollars from our approved vendor.
all.zh: 更換報價來自核可供應商，金額為 900 美元。

all.en: Including taxes, the total request comes to nine thousand six hundred dollars.
all.zh: 含稅後本次申請總額為 9,600 美元。

all.en: This amount falls within our department capital expenditure budget for Q2.
all.zh: 此金額在本部門 Q2 資本支出預算範圍內。

all.en: I have attached three competitive quotes per company procurement policy.
all.zh: 我已依公司採購政策附上三家比較報價。

all.en: Please review the attachments and let me know if anything is missing.
all.zh: 請審閱附件，若有缺漏請告知。

all.en: Once approved, vendors can deliver everything within ten business days.
all.zh: 一經核准，供應商可於 10 個工作天內全數交貨。

all.en: I would appreciate a decision by the end of next week.
all.zh: 盼能於下週末前獲得決議。

all.en: Delaying this purchase may affect our campaign launch in June.
all.zh: 若延後採購，恐影響我們六月的活動上線。

all.en: Thank you for your consideration and ongoing support of our team.
all.zh: 感謝您的考量與對我們團隊的長期支持。

all.en: Please contact me at extension 4421 with any questions or concerns.
all.zh: 若有任何問題或疑慮，請撥分機 4421 聯繫我。

all.en: I am also available to present these items in person if helpful.
all.zh: 若有需要，我也可親自到場簡報這些項目。

all.en: All proposed vendors are pre-qualified under our latest compliance review.
all.zh: 所提供應商皆已通過我們最新的合規審查並具備供應資格。

all.en: Delivery dates can be staggered to minimize disruption to ongoing work.
all.zh: 交貨日期可分批安排，以將對日常工作的干擾降到最低。

all.en: Old equipment will be cycled through our certified electronics recycler.
all.zh: 汰換的舊設備將透過我們認證的電子廢棄物回收商處理。

all.en: Asset tags will be applied immediately upon receipt of every new item.
all.zh: 所有新進物品在收貨時將立即貼上資產標籤。

all.en: The IT helpdesk has confirmed compatibility with our network configuration.
all.zh: 資訊服務台已確認與本公司網路設定相容。

all.en: Facilities will coordinate installation outside of regular business hours.
all.zh: 總務部會於正常上班時間外協調安裝事宜。

all.en: A summary report on utilization will be shared after the first quarter.
all.zh: 首季結束後將分享使用率彙整報告。

all.en: Your prompt attention to this matter is greatly appreciated as always.
all.zh: 一如既往，感謝您對此事的迅速處理。

all.en: Best regards, Hana Kim, Marketing Operations Manager, Riverside Building.
all.zh: 敬祝商安，Hana Kim，行銷營運經理，Riverside 大樓。

all.en: Postscript, our team can absorb training costs from our internal budget.
all.zh: 附註：本團隊可由內部預算吸收訓練費用。

all.en: Vendor representatives have offered free onsite setup as a courtesy service.
all.zh: 供應商代表已主動提供免費到府安裝作為禮遇服務。

all.en: All chairs come with a ten year warranty covering manufacturer defects.
all.zh: 所有椅子皆附十年保固，涵蓋製造瑕疵。

all.en: The printer model qualifies for our existing service contract terms.
all.zh: 該印表機型號適用我方現行服務合約條款。

all.en: Phone system upgrades may reduce monthly conference call charges noticeably.
all.zh: 電話系統升級可顯著降低每月會議通話費用。

all.en: I have shared this request with the finance liaison for early review.
all.zh: 本人已將本申請轉交財務聯絡人進行初步審視。

all.en: Approval routing should follow our standard four-tier signature workflow.
all.zh: 核准流程應遵循標準四層級簽核作業。

all.en: Please flag any required modifications before the formal purchase order issues.
all.zh: 請於正式採購單發出前標註所有需修改事項。

all.en: I am happy to coordinate directly with selected vendors after approval.
all.zh: 核准後本人樂於直接與指定供應商協調事宜。

all.en: Thank you once again for prioritizing our team productivity and well-being.
all.zh: 再次感謝您優先考量本團隊的生產力與福祉。

all.en: Honestly, the old chairs are starting to feel like the ones my grandmother kept in her sewing room.
all.zh: 老實說，現在的舊椅子已經有點像我奶奶縫紉間裡那些古董椅。

all.en: Comfortable in nostalgia, perhaps, but not exactly built for an eight hour workday.
all.zh: 也許懷舊起來是舒服，但拿來坐八小時上班用實在不適合。

all.en: Two colleagues already bring their own cushions from home, which honestly looks a bit funny.
all.zh: 已經有兩位同事自己從家裡帶坐墊來，老實說畫面有點滑稽。

all.en: One of them said her physiotherapist is the same one her dad uses for back pain.
all.zh: 其中一位還說，她的物理治療師正是她爸爸治背痛的同一位。

all.en: That detail made me realize how much our office choices ripple into people personal lives.
all.zh: 這個細節讓我意識到，辦公室的設備選擇會這樣影響到大家的私人生活。

all.en: By the way, the speaker phone issue caused a real laugh during last Friday client call.
all.zh: 順帶一提，上週五客戶通話時擴音電話的問題讓我們鬧了個笑話。

all.en: The client kept asking if we were calling from underwater because of the static noise.
all.zh: 客戶一直問我們是不是從水底打過來的，因為雜訊太誇張了。

all.en: We managed to keep our professionalism, but it would be lovely not to repeat that moment.
all.zh: 我們勉強維持住專業形象，不過真的不想再經歷一次那種場面。

all.en: Please reach out if you would like me to share the side by side comparison spreadsheet.
all.zh: 如果您想看我整理的比較對照表，歡迎隨時來信跟我索取。

all.en: I am genuinely grateful for your support and I will keep you posted on delivery dates.
all.zh: 我由衷感謝您的支持，後續交貨時間我也會持續更新給您。
